messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document. Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text. Section metadata: { "node_id": "0051", "title": "Supercell旗下又一老产品回归顶流《奔奔王国》成今年唯一上榜新品", "page_index": 16, "page_range": "16-1" } Section text: ## Supercell旗下又一老产品回归顶流《奔奔王国》成今年唯一上榜新品 纵观整体榜单，与往年相比，虽然排名次序上有些许变化，但上榜产品大都仍是熟悉的身影。其中最值得关注的当属《皇室战争》（Clash Royale）和《奔奔王国》（Kingshot）两款产品，它们分别代表了老产品系统性革新与新品的精准突袭两条不同的成功路径。在格局固化的全球市场中，新老产品的增长机会已然分化：老产品的复兴依赖于对核心进度、玩法与经济系统进行不惧风险的深度重构；而新品的突围则依赖于在已验证的模型上进行精准的微创新设计，并与饱和式的营销攻击高效协同。 (点点数据将在报告下一页对《皇室战争》《奔奔王国》两款产品展开具体分析。) 2025年海外移动游戏收入TOP30
排名icon游戏名全年流水(亿元)排名icon游戏名全年流水(亿元)排名icon游戏名全年流水(亿元)
1Last War:Survival154.5311实况足球52.5721荒野乱斗36.82
2Royal Match116.1112怪物弹珠50.3322Free Fire36.35
3无尽冬日112.6113皇室战争46.4023王国之歌33.28
4大富翁GO!100.4514崩坏：星穹铁道46.3524原神33.02
5金币大师96.8715梦幻花园44.9625部落冲突32.32
6糖果粉碎传奇95.7116天堂M44.8226使命召唤手游32.30
7宝可梦TCG Pocket72.4517奔奔王国42.2627赛马娘31.54
8宝可梦GO68.4818Fate/Grand Order41.3528Last Z: Survival Shooter30.31
9Roblox66.5319绝地求生M41.2029Toon Blast29.47
10浪漫餐厅53.9520梦想城镇38.9630文明霸业28.89
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制

message.content:
This section provides a market analysis and ranked dataset for the 2025 overseas mobile game industry. It is structured to answer retrieval queries on the following dimensions:
- **Topics & Scope:** Global mobile game revenue trends, comparative success strategies for legacy versus new titles, and 2025 market performance.
- **Entities & Dates:** Centers on 2025 annual data. Key entities include Supercell, 《皇室战争》(Clash Royale), 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot), and the full TOP 30 game roster. Data is attributed to 点点数据.
- **Claims & Insights:** Asserts that in a saturated market, legacy game revival depends on deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction of core progression, gameplay, and economic systems. New product breakthroughs rely on precise micro-innovations on validated models combined with saturated marketing campaigns. Identifies 《奔奔王国》 as the only new release to enter the 2025 TOP 30.
- **Metrics & Table:** Contains the "2025年海外移动游戏收入TOP30" table, mapping Rank (1–30), Game Name, and Annual Revenue (全年流水 in 亿元). Notable metrics include #1 Last War: Survival (154.53亿元), #13 皇室战争 (46.40亿元), and #17 奔奔王国 (42.26亿元).
- **Evidence Types:** Structured revenue ranking table, analytical market commentary, and source attribution. Includes a forward reference indicating detailed case studies for the two highlighted titles appear on the subsequent page.
- **Retrieval Questions Answered:** What were the top-grossing overseas mobile games in 2025 and their exact annual revenues? Which new titles broke into the annual top 30? How do growth strategies differ between revitalized legacy games and new launches? What is the 2025 revenue performance of Supercell's featured titles? What organization sourced and compiled the ranking data?

New product breakthroughs rely on precise micro-innovations on validated models combined with saturated marketing campaigns. Identifies 《奔奔王国》 as the only new release to enter the 2025 TOP 30.
- **Metrics & Table:** Contains the "2025年海外移动游戏收入TOP30" table, mapping Rank (1–30), Game Name, and Annual Revenue (全年流水 in 亿元). Notable metrics include #1 Last War: Survival (154.53亿元), #13 皇室战争 (46.40亿元), and #17 奔奔王国 (42.26亿元).
- **Evidence Types:** Structured revenue ranking table, analytical market commentary, and source attribution. Includes a forward reference indicating detailed case studies for the two highlighted titles appear on the subsequent page.
- **Retrieval Questions Answered:** What were the top-grossing overseas mobile games in 2025 and their exact annual revenues? Which new titles broke into the annual top 30? How do growth strategies differ between revitalized legacy games and new launches? What is the 2025 revenue performance of Supercell's featured titles?
